flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Boise State University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.1k → $9.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Boise State University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($25.0k → $27.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Boise State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Boise State University rose 35% between 2021 and 2024 (30.7% → 41.4%).
